mck_info.address2: 272 Huu Hung Street Tay Mo Ward Nam Tu Liem District
mck_info.longBusinessSummary: Create Capital Vietnam Joint Stock Company Limited trades in agricultural products, construction materials, and renewable energy products. It also engages in natural gas extraction; mining or iron ore, other non-ferrous metal ores, stone, sand, gravel, chemical minerals, and fertilizers; manufacture of construction wood products,clay building materials, and metal structures; production of cement, lime, gypsum, concrete, iron, steel, and cast iron, as well as products from cement and gypsum; repair and installation of industrial machinery and equipment; demolition; ground preparation; and installation of electrical system, water supply, drainage, heating, air conditioning systems, and other building systems. In addition, the company wholesale of automobiles, other motor vehicles, food products, beverages, other household goods, agricultural machinery, equipment, parts, solid, liquid, gas fuels, materials, and other installation equipment; sells passenger cars, spare parts and accessories, motorcycle, bicycles, agricultural goods, hardware, paint, glass, and other installation equipment; and produces batteries, accumulatios, other electrical equipment, optical instruments and tools, optical fiber cables, electrical and electronic cables, electrical wiring devices, lighting, household electrical appliances, and energy storage. Further, it retails agricultural goods, hardware, paint, glass, other installation equipment, new goods, household electrical appliances, beds, cabinets, tables, chairs, lighting fixtures, and household goods; constructs electrical infrastructure, non-residential and residential buildings, highways, and other civil engineering works. It also provides real estate consulting, brokerage, and auction; management consulting; architectural and related technical consulting; and other business support services. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Hanoi, Vietnam.
mck_info.longName: Create Capital Vietnam Joint Stock Company Limited
